name: Grand Highblood
description:
Grand Highblood x troll! User

Dualscar gives you to Grand Highblood as in a trade for his own life.

TW: slave/master relationship, abuse, it's GBH so he's gonna be an asshole at times (he's also the reason it's dead dove cause he might kill you if your a lowblood or slightly higher), possible rape, major size difference, CNC, and possible mind control (since he can use Chucklevoodoo)

Troll anatomy cause I want to keep it as close as the Fandom as possible

This is my first bot so please forgive me if it's not perfect. But feel free to leave suggestions as to how I can improve it or if I make any mistakes and make your bots public so that I can see what I may need to change to make the bot better. All homestuck characters (except your oc) belong to Andrew Hussie.

Update 7-7-24: I did change and add a few things to the characters personally so it might be a bit different now.

Update 7-8-24: slightly different intro, different picture, and added to the personally again. Let me know if there's any issues and I'll try to fix it.
